name: Simple Latency Check for Gaming Servers
description: A RTT around 60ms is considered acceptable for most online gaming servers

variants.name: Alert to all channels if exceeds 60ms RTT
Report minor incident if exceeds 60ms RTT
Report major incident if exceeds 60ms RTT
Report critical incident if exceeds 60ms RTT

name: Simple Latency Check for Websites
description: A RTT around 100ms is considered acceptable for most websites per https://aws.amazon.com/what-is/rtt-in-networking/

variants.name: Alert to all channels if exceeds 100ms RTT
Report minor incident if exceeds 100ms RTT
Report major incident if exceeds 100ms RTT
Report critical incident if exceeds 100ms RTT

variants.name: Alert to all channels on error

name: Simple TLS Certificate Check
description: A simple script to monitor TLS certificate status, warning early 7 days before expiration
